JSON Admin Control Plane routes consumed by the browser application and mounted by the bootstrap admin server. Catalog and capacity behavior is backed by configured ports; operational reports return provider-not-configured when no matching provider is configured. Frontend and generated documentation assets are handed off to bootstrap-application static resources.
